## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bash scripts/init.sh` and it passes.
- [ ] No real names, emails, credentials, or company-specific data are in the diff.
- [ ] Any example data is invented, not anonymized from real data.
- [ ] This PR is one change, not several bundled together.
